subcodes.first_line: O Thou kind Pardoner! These pure souls have been freed from this earthly prison and winged their flight to Thy realm
subcodes.first_line_orig: آمرزنده و مهربانا این جانهای پاک از زندان خاک آزاد شدند و بجهان تو پرواز
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for the departed, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
